PROP-baseauction-pre-004.text: performUpkeep must only start auctions for assets with usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd.
PROP-baseauction-pre-004.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start, asset): balanceUsd(asset) < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert

locations.note: balanceUsd vs minAuctionSizeUsd guard enforced during eligible asset iteration
